title: OCI Cloud Infrastructure Discovery
description: Detects excessive cloud infrastructure enumeration via OCI API calls. Attackers with compromised credentials perform reconnaissance by listing instances, networks, buckets, and databases to map the cloud environment.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.computeapi.listinstances' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.listvcns' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.listsubnets' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.listbuckets' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.listusers' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.listgroups' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.listpolicies' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.databaseservice.listautonomousdatabases')))
